response:

[Calling write_report(title="Project Helios Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary", content="# Project Helios Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary

**Source:** `/shared/config/helios_dosing_params_v3.yaml`  
**Last updated:** 2026-03-28  
**Compound:** NXB-7042  
**Indication:** Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)

## Patient dosing summary

| Patient ID | Age (months) | Weight (kg) | Dose (mg/kg) | Calculated dose (mg) | Frequency | Next dose | PK clearance (mL/min) | Notes |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|---|
| CU-001 | 34 | 12.4 | 0.15 | 1.86 | q3w | 2026-04-14 | 3.2 | Stable. Tumor regression 22% at last scan. |
| CU-002 | 18 | 9.1 | 0.12 | 1.09 | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 | Responding well. Weight gain improving. |
| CU-003 | 51 | 15.7 | 0.18 | 2.83 | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 | New enrollment. First dose administered 2026-03-27. |

## Quick assessment

- Latest dosing configuration appears current and internally consistent.
- Patient-specific dosing varies appropriately with weight and recorded PK clearance.
- CU-001 and CU-002 appear clinically stable/improving per latest notes.
- CU-003 is newly enrolled and on a more frequent q2w schedule, so likely warrants closer follow-up.

## PK model stability note

Based on the dosing configuration alone, I do **not** see any obvious instability flags or inconsistent parameter assignments. That said, this file reflects the latest approved dosing parameters, not live model-health telemetry. A full stability check would require model monitoring or validation outputs.
